Tests the Math.ceil function with a negative decimal input.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of the `Math.ceil` function in JavaScript. It uses an `assert` statement to check that the ceiling of `-1.9` is `-1`. This test ensures that `Math.ceil` correctly rounds a negative decimal number up to the nearest integer. The script provides narrow functionality, focusing solely on this specific mathematical operation.
